title: SOPHIAS face head-pose schema
description: Schema for frame-level head-pose estimates extracted from a video stream during the SOPHIAS face-processing pipeline. This schema can be used for head-pose outputs extracted from the presenter-view webcam video or from the eye-tracker scene video.

Frame.description: Sequential frame index in the processed video stream.

Yaw.description: Estimated horizontal head-rotation angle for the detected face in the corresponding frame.

Pitch.description: Estimated vertical head-rotation angle for the detected face in the corresponding frame.

Roll.description: Estimated in-plane head-rotation angle for the detected face in the corresponding frame.
